title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on the future of work and professional life.

questions.question: Do you think remote working will become the norm, or will most people return to offices?
Should companies be responsible for their employees' mental health and wellbeing?

script.text: Some people say that technology is making it harder for workers to switch off from their jobs. Do you agree?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
